questionHtml:
Which condition will cause the given equilibrium to shift to the right?

Ag+ (aq) + Cl− (aq) ⇌ AgCl (s)


A.  One half of solid AgCl is removed.

B.  Water is added.

C.  Solid NaCl is added.

D.  The system is subjected to increased pressure.
